nameMeanings.name: Corbet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Walter Corbet, a royal knight in 12th-century Scotland, was the first of that name in that kingdom. His 13th-century descendants were major landholders in the Borders, and in the 14th century they acquired lands in the North of Scotland.

variants.name: Corbett
meanings: English (West Midlands, of Norman origin): nickname from Old French corbet ‘raven’, probably denoting someone with dark hair or a dark complexion.

History: This is the name of a family descended from Hugh Corbet, a Norman baron who settled in Shropshire following the Norman Conquest. One of his descendants, Sir Richard Corbet, was granted land near Shrewsbury in 1223; since the 13th century, this place has been known as Moreton Corbet. The name was taken from Shropshire to Scotland in the 12th century and to northern Ireland in the 17th century, and thence to North America by at least one group of bearers of the name.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
meanings: Hebrew: Bitter; Marion is the French form.

variants.name: Marion
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

variants.name: Marcia
meanings: Often used as a feminine equivalent of Mark , but in fact a feminine form of Marcius, itself a derivative of Marcus . One St Marcia is commemorated in a group with Felix, Luciolus, Fortunatus, and others; another with Zenais, Cyria, and Valeria; and a third with Ariston, Crescentian, Eutychian, Urban, Vitalis, Justus, Felicissimus, Felix, and Symphorosa. None is individually very famous.

en.lifeSummary: Mary Corbet was born in 1426, in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. She married Thomas Thorne Esq about 1446, in Gamston, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 17 August 1471, in Wellington, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45, and was buried in Wellington, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Corbet(은)는 1426년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 모레턴 코벳에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1446년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 갬스턴에서 Thomas Thorne Esq(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1471년 8월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 웰잉턴에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 웰잉턴에 묻혔다.
